featuredWorkDescription: I'm an Engineering Manager with 15+ years in software engineering — including hands-on full-stack development, team leadership, and now engineering management. I love anything with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, or BBQ Sauce in it. Here's a couple tasty treats I made.
